title: Working for Families and paid parental leave payments – Anzac 2026
content:
The Working for Families (WfF) payment will not be affected by Anzac Day.
Payment dates for WfF weekly and fortnightly payments are Tuesday 28 or Wednesday 29 April.
You might see in myIR that the processing dates are showing as different to the dates above. However, this does not change the date the payment is made.
Payment dates for the paid parental leave fortnightly payment are Tuesday 5 and Wednesday 6 May.
If you need to get in touch with us, please send a message in myIR.
How to send a message in myIR
